title: HSLC Annual Examination 2026 — Routine Released
desc: SEBA HSLC (Class 10) Annual Examination 2026 routine released. Exam begins February 2026.
bullets: Exam: February–March 2026.
Admit cards distributed via school.
Results at sebaonline.org and resassam.nic.in.

title: HSLC 2026 — Form Fill-Up Notification
desc: SEBA announces form fill-up schedule for HSLC Annual Examination 2026 candidates.
bullets: Form fill-up via school examination cell.
Regular, Ex-Regular and Compartmental candidates.
Check school notice board for deadline.

title: HSLC 2025 Result — Published at sebaonline.org
desc: SEBA HSLC 2025 Annual Examination results published online.
bullets: Check results at sebaonline.org.
Results also via SMS on registered mobile.
Marksheet from school after official declaration.

title: HSLC 2026 Admit Card Download — Notice
desc: SEBA HSLC 2026 admit card download notice for regular and ex-regular candidates.
bullets: Admit cards downloadable through school login.
Physical copies distributed by school.
Report any discrepancy to school immediately.

title: Class IX Annual Examination 2026 — Guidelines
desc: SEBA guidelines for Class IX Annual Examination conducted by affiliated schools.
bullets: Conducted by individual schools under SEBA norms.
Results determine eligibility for Class X board exam.
Check school notice board for schedule.
